name: json-toolkit
title: JSON Toolkit
description: Format, escape, and unescape JSON without leaving Raycast.
author: fungx

commands.name: format-json
commands.title: Format JSON
commands.description: Format manually entered JSON or JSON-like text

commands.name: format-json-selected-text
commands.title: Format JSON from Selected Text
commands.description: Format the text selected in the frontmost application

commands.name: format-json-clipboard
commands.title: Format JSON from Clipboard
commands.description: Format the current text clipboard contents

commands.name: escape-json
commands.title: Escape JSON String
commands.description: Serialize text as a JSON string

commands.name: unescape-json
commands.title: Unescape JSON String
commands.description: Decode exactly one JSON string layer
